name: Polaris Project
description: Operates the U.S. National Human Trafficking Hotline and works to disrupt trafficking networks through data-driven strategies.

name: Not For Sale
description: Global organization working to end modern slavery through prevention, intervention, and aftercare programs.

name: The Exodus Road
description: Partners with law enforcement worldwide to rescue victims of human trafficking and sexual exploitation.

name: Human Rights Watch
description: International organization that investigates and reports on abuses including labor exploitation in the webcam industry.

name: ICIJ (International Consortium of Investigative Journalists)
description: Global network of journalists that exposed exploitation in the billion-dollar webcam industry.

name: National Human Trafficking Hotline
description: 24/7 confidential hotline (1-888-373-7888) for reporting tips, connecting with services, and requesting training or technical assistance.

name: Project Mona's House
description: Provides transitional housing and support services to survivors of sex trafficking and sexual exploitation.

name: NCMEC (National Center for Missing & Exploited Children)
description: Works to find missing children, reduce child sexual exploitation, and prevent future victimization.
